prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江省综合类最低位次分别为12273→11639→14606→8307→8584名，整体呈波动趋势。2023年因专业结构调整位次大幅后移至14606名，2024年恢复至8307名，2025年基本稳定在8584名。近两年位次明显前移，反映学校在浙江的报考热度回升；2021–2025年浙江省综合类招生计划分别为111→101→101→60→53人，呈持续缩减趋势。2026年计划进一步缩减至35人，较2025年减少18人（缩招约34%），缩招幅度较大，将显著加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 大连理工大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第28名，近年排名稳定在第28–32名区间，属于中坚985层次，对浙江考生有较强吸引力；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及录取断档信号（2023年电信学部位次断档至60000名）；抖音热度排名第55（较热），短视频曝光量中等；2024年有投档线异常记录（投档线降至420分相关舆情），但该信号主要涉及其他省份，对浙江影响有限。整体声誉偏负面可能轻微抑制报考热度；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术A+、力学A、土木工程A、工商管理A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、软件工程A、生物医学工程A、控制科学与工程A-、环境科学与工程A-，共10个A-及以上学科，学科实力突出，对理工类考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化、计算机类等专业社会热度高热推荐，与该校优势学科高度契合；土木建筑类分化观望。浙江省2026年考生总数约400,000人（较2025年290,790人增长约37.6%），考生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧；省控线（普通类一段）近五年在488–497分区间波动，2025年为490分，基本稳定；大连理工大学位于辽宁省，非本省高校，在浙江省招生占比约1.5%–2.7%（2021–2025年），属于跨省招生，无本省保护效应，报考受全国性因素影响更大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年招生计划大幅缩减（53→35人，缩招34%）带来的位次前移压力，以及浙江省考生总数大幅增长（约37.6%）带来的竞争加剧效应，两者形成对冲。缩招使位次理论上应前移至约6834名，但考生暴增和声誉偏负面因素使位次小幅后移。预测2026年最低位次约7034名，区间6534–7534名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 人工智能（新工科大师班）（全校理工类专业任选）
- 电子信息类（创新班）（含电子信息工程、计算机科学与技术等）
- 计算机科学与技术（国家基础学科拔尖计划班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 人工智能（创新班）
- 智能制造工程（创新班）（含智能制造工程、机械设计制造及其自动化等）
- 数学类（华罗庚数学国家基础学科拔尖计划班）
- 大数据管理与应用（新工科拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 电子信息类（含电子信息工程、计算机科学与技术等，非创新班）
- 人工智能（未来技术班）（高年级分流）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年大连理工大学在浙江招生计划仅35人（3个专业），均为高热度电子信息类、计算机类、人工智能类专业。位次在预测区间6534–7534名内，建议以二档为主力、一档冲刺、三档保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<6534名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（人工智能新工科大师班、电子信息类创新班）；位次在区间中段（约7000名附近）以二档为主；位次接近区间上限（>7500名）建议谨慎报考。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Zhejiang comprehensive category were 12273 → 11639 → 14606 → 8307 → 8584, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2023, due to adjustments in major structure, the ranking significantly dropped to 14606, recovered to 8307 in 2024, and remained stable at 8584 in 2025. In recent two years, rankings have notably moved forward, reflecting increased application enthusiasm for the school in Zhejiang. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for Zhejiang comprehensive category were 111 → 101 → 101 → 60 → 53, showing a continuous reduction trend. The 2026 plan further reduces to 35, a decrease of 18 from 2025 (a reduction of about 34%), which is significant and will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Dalian University of Technology is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks 28th, with recent rankings stable in the 28–32 range, belonging to the mid-tier 985 level, strongly attractive to Zhejiang candidates. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving signals of admission gaps (in 2023, the telecommunications department ranking dropped to 60000). Douyin popularity ranks 55th (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure. In 2024, there were records of abnormal admission cutoffs (related to cutoffs dropping to 420 points), but this signal mainly involves other provinces, with limited impact on Zhejiang. Overall slightly negative reputation may mildly suppress application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Mechanics A, Civil Engineering A, Business Administration A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, Biomedical Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, totaling 10 disciplines rated A- or above, with outstanding disciplinary strength, strongly attracting science and engineering candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Computer Science are highly popular and recommended, highly aligned with the school's advantageous disciplines. Civil Engineering and Architecture are differentiated and wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Zhejiang is about 400,000 (an increase of about 37.6% from 290,790 in 2025), significantly increasing competition. The provincial control line (general first segment) has fluctuated between 488–497 points in the past five years, with 2025 at 490 points, basically stable. Dalian University of Technology is located in Liaoning Province, not a local university in Zhejiang, with enrollment in Zhejiang accounting for about 1.5%–2.7% (2021–2025), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, without local protection effect, and more affected by national factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant reduction in 2026 enrollment plan (53→35, a 34% reduction) causing upward pressure on rankings, and the substantial increase in Zhejiang candidate numbers (about 37.6%) intensifying competition, these two factors offset each other. The reduction theoretically pushes the ranking forward to about 6834, but the candidate surge and slightly negative reputation cause a slight backward shift. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 7034, with a range of 6534–7534.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Artificial Intelligence (New Engineering Master Class) (Free choice of all engineering majors)
- Electronic Information (Innovation Class) (Including Electronic Information Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, etc.)
- Computer Science and Technology (National Basic Discipline Top Talent Training Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Artificial Intelligence (Innovation Class)
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering (Innovation Class) (Including Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, Mechanical Design and Automation, etc.)
- Mathematics (Hua Luogeng Mathematics National Basic Discipline Top Talent Training Program)
- Big Data Management and Application (New Engineering Top Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Electronic Information (Including Electronic Information Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, etc., non-Innovation Class)
- Artificial Intelligence (Future Technology Class) (Streaming in senior years).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Dalian University of Technology's enrollment plan in Zhejiang is only 35 students (3 majors), all high-popularity electronic information, computer science, and artificial intelligence majors. With rankings within the predicted range of 6534–7534, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main, Tier 1 for sprinting, and Tier 3 as safety. If rankings are significantly better than the lower limit (<6534), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Artificial Intelligence New Engineering Master Class, Electronic Information Innovation Class). If rankings are in the middle of the range (around 7000), mainly choose Tier 2. If rankings are near the upper limit (>7500), it is advised to apply cautiously.
